# Avanafil 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Avanafil 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Avanafil</strong> 目前有 <strong>19 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Avanafil 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Treatment of erectile dysfunction in adult men. In order for Spedra to be effective, sexual stimulation is required.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>amenorrhea (disease)（94.6%）</li>
<li>erectile dysfunction (disease)（93.4%）</li>
<li>hypoalphalipoproteinemia（91.5%）</li>
<li>infectious bovine rhinotracheitis（90.6%）</li>
<li>malignant catarrh（90.6%）</li>
<li>Raynaud disease（88.5%）</li>
<li>Ambras type hypertrichosis universalis congenita（87.8%）</li>
<li>obsolete susceptibility to ischemic stroke（87.3%）</li>
<li>malformation syndrome with odontal and/or periodontal component（80.5%）</li>
<li>stroke disorder（79.2%）</li>
<li>adrenal gland hyperfunction（79.1%）</li>
<li>cytomegalovirus infection（77.8%）</li>
<li>syndrome with a Dandy-Walker malformation as major feature（77.4%）</li>
<li>duodenogastric reflux（77.3%）</li>
<li>isolated genetic hair shaft abnormality（76.9%）</li>
<li>duodenal obstruction（75.8%）</li>
<li>ABri amyloidosis（75.1%）</li>
<li>tinea manuum（73.9%）</li>
<li>hypercarotenemia and vitamin A deficiency, autosomal recessive（72.3%）</li>
<li>hypertrichosis (disease)（71.5%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/avanafil/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
